turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I've been feeling really anxious lately, especially before big meetings at work. It's like my mind just races with all sorts of what-ifs.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: That sounds really tough. Have you tried any techniques to calm your mind before these meetings?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Not really, I usually just try to push through it. But sometimes that doesn't work and I end up stressing out even more.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: It's understandable to feel overwhelmed, but deep breathing exercises or mindfulness can be helpful. Would you like some tips on those?
